gantt
    title A Gantt Diagram
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section
        A task          :a1, 2014-01-01, 30d
        Another task    :after a1, 20d
    section Another
        Task in Another :2014-01-12, 12d
        another task    :24d
---
                       A Gantt Diagram

  Section
    A task           ########################----------------  01-01 -> 01-31
    Another task     ------------------------################  01-31 -> 02-20
  Another
    Task in Another  ---------#########----------------------  01-12 -> 01-24
    another task     ------------------####################--  01-24 -> 02-17
                     ----------------------------------------
                     Jan 2014                 Feb 2014
